ads.title: Vintage 1982 Atari Dig Dug Stand-Up Arcade Cabinet – Fully Working & Ready to Blast!
ads.description: Step into the golden age of arcades with this authentic 1982 Atari Dig Dug upright cabinet! This is the real deal — not a mini, not a replica, not a conversion. It’s a genuine vintage stand-up machine straight from the era when arcades ruled. Dig Dug is pure addictive fun: burrow through colorful underground tunnels, pump up the Pookas and Fygars until they explode, or drop rocks on them for massive points. Crisp graphics, thumping original sounds, responsive joystick and buttons — it plays exactly like you remember from the 80s! Condition: In great working condition with no issues. Everything fires up perfectly — screen is bright and clear, controls are tight, sound is loud and spot-on. No flickering, no dead spots, no repairs needed. It’s been well-maintained and is ready to provide endless entertainment right out of the box. This cabinet is a show-stopper for any: • Game room • Man cave • Basement bar • Retro collector’s lineup These original dedicated 1982 uprights are getting rarer every year, especially in solid working shape like this one. Price: $1,900 or best offer Local pickup only (cash preferred). It’s a big, heavy classic (roughly 72" tall), so bring a friend or a truck — happy to help load it! Serious buyers only — message me anytime with questions or to set up a time to come test it out and play a few rounds. First come, first served. #DigDug #VintageArcade #Atari1982 #RetroGaming #ArcadeCabinet #ClassicArcade
